## utm-dev setup

Install a predefined set of SDKs

### Synopsis

Install a predefined set of SDKs defined in the sdk-android-list.json and sdk-ios-list.json files.

```
utm-dev setup [setup-name] [flags]
```

### Options

```
  -h, --help          help for setup
      --no-emulator   Skip installing the emulator and system-images (Android only)
```

* [utm-dev](utm-dev.md)	 - Build cross-platform hybrid apps with Go
